things.name: FESPACO African Film Festival
things.description: Africa's largest cinema festival held every two years in February

things.name: National Museum of Burkina Faso
things.description: Traditional masks, bronze castings and daily life objects of the Mossi and Lobi

things.name: Central Market (Grand Marche)
things.description: Ouaga's main market with Burkinabe woven fabric, leather goods and food

things.name: Mossi Royal Court
things.description: Audience with the Mogho Naaba - the Mossi Emperor who still holds traditional power

things.name: Maison du Peuple Cultural Centre
things.description: Government arts centre hosting concerts and exhibitions

things.name: Village Artisanal de Ouagadougou
things.description: Bronze casting, leatherwork and weaving workshops in a craft village

things.name: Laongo Sculpture Symposium
things.description: Outdoor granite sculpture park 35km from the city

things.name: Bangr-Weogo Urban Nature Reserve
things.description: Urban nature park with gazelles and a botanical garden

things.name: Temple of Enlightenment
things.description: Syncretic temple built by a visionary with local stone and recycled materials

things.name: Riz Gras (Fat Rice)
things.description: Burkina Faso's most popular dish - rice cooked in meat stock with vegetables
